Pizza In Town.

Hot, fresh and mouth-watering pizza at an unbelievable price — piled with real mozzarella and baked till the cheese pulls. Seven kitchens across the region, one promise: cheese loaded in every bite.

WHY LA PIZZARIO

Four promises, kept on every order.

Premium Ingredients

Real mozzarella, fresh vegetables and quality meats — nothing cut for cost.

Perfectly Baked

Every base is baked to that exact edge of crisp crust and soft centre.

Rich & Cheesy

Cheese loaded in every bite — it's not a slogan, it's how we top every pizza.

Quality You Can Trust

Consistent recipes, checked kitchens, across all seven branches — every time.

OUR STORY

Crafted with passion. Baked to perfection.

La Pizzario started with one idea: pizza this good shouldn't be hard to find. Every pie is hand-built to order — real mozzarella, fresh vegetables, and a base baked until the crust is crisp and the middle stays soft.

What began as a single kitchen has grown into seven, spread across Bidhannagar, Chandidas, S.B. More, Prantika, Raniganj, Asansol and Bolpur — each one following the same recipes, the same standards, and the same rule: cheese loaded in every bite.

WHAT WE STAND FOR

Four things we never compromise on.

Premium Ingredients

Fresh vegetables sourced regularly, real mozzarella, and quality meats — the base of every good pizza.

Perfectly Baked

Every base goes in and comes out at exactly the right time — that's what gives our crust its bite.

Rich & Cheesy

We don't go light on cheese. Every pizza is loaded generously, right to the edge.

Quality You Can Trust

The same recipe, the same care, whichever of our seven branches you order from.

7Branches Across The Region
60+Items On The Menu
100%Free Home Delivery
